aiCareer.title: AI Career Guidance
aiCareer.subtitle: Provide professional AI learning guidance for your child

questions.school: 1. What school does your child currently attend?
questions.classLevel: 2. What is the overall level of your child's class?
questions.scoreRange: 3. What are the score ranges for recent Chinese and English exams?
questions.languageDifficulty: 4. In Chinese and English learning, what do you think is your child's biggest difficulty right now?
questions.scienceCharacteristics: 5. Regarding science subjects, have you observed any characteristics in your child's thinking and problem-solving performance?
questions.learningObstacle: 6. In the process of daily learning, what do you think is the factor that most affects your child's learning?
questions.hobbies: 7. When there are no learning tasks, what does your child like to do most? Are there any long-term interests or talents?
questions.personality: 8. What is your child's personality like in terms of interpersonal relationships and character? How do they usually react when facing setbacks?
questions.extraTime: 9. Besides school tasks, how much extra time do you think your child has for extracurricular learning or training classes each week?
questions.pressureTolerance: 10. When arranging learning and training, how do you think your child handles pressure?
questions.learningGoal: 11. If you rate on a scale of 1-5, what is your expectation for your child's learning goals in the next three to five years?

personalityTests.test1: [Personality Test] At school or gatherings with peers, your child usually:
personalityTests.test2: [Personality Test] When learning or thinking, your child is more likely to:
personalityTests.test3: [Personality Test] When facing conflicts or choices, your child usually:
personalityTests.test4: [Personality Test] In terms of learning arrangements or daily routine, your child is more like:
personalityTests.test5: [Personality Test] When tired or stressed, he/she tends to:

extraTime.heavy: Child has heavy school learning tasks
extraTime.plenty: Child has plenty of free time

personalityTest1.social: Easily integrates into groups, interacts with multiple peers, often becomes the center of conversation
personalityTest1.quiet: Tends to be with one or two familiar friends, or prefers quiet activities alone

personalityTest2.concrete: Focuses on facts, steps, and clear requirements from teachers; likes "concrete things"
personalityTest2.abstract: Asks questions beyond textbooks, makes associative leaps, likes to explore "concepts" and possibilities

personalityTest3.logical: Focuses on logic, fairness principles, expresses "reasons" and "basis"
personalityTest3.emotional: Values own or others' feelings more, easily influenced by emotions when making decisions

personalityTest4.planned: Likes to plan ahead (organizing desk, writing study plans), completes tasks in order
personalityTest4.spontaneous: Often quite spontaneous, needs reminders to start action, not resistant to sudden changes

personalityTest5.socialRelax: Relaxes by chatting with friends, going out, participating in social activities
personalityTest5.quietRelax: Wants to quiet down, e.g., Listening to music, being alone, doing personal hobbies

validation.classLevel: Overall level of your child's class
validation.scoreRange: Chinese and English exam score ranges
